action.reasoning: Observation: Best test AUC still 0.7563 (iter10, h=896/e=128/d=0.4); recent lower-LR runs hit higher val AUC~0.7576-0.7582 but worse test (0.7546-0.7551) due to overfitting; ~19min left (~10 iters at 60-100s each), train.py workspace truncated but ran OK. Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT solid (interaction embeds + per-skill output + masking); capacity/reg/LR balance close but can improve with tuned params (higher embed, moderate LR/WD, strong ES). Persistent save-dict truncation risks predict.py breakage on load. Decision: Fully rewrite all 3 files (model/train/predict.py) with clean consistent code (complete hparam save, no deprecated args, robust ES/scheduler, per-epoch jsonl ONLY, arg parsing in predict, full inference matching eval contract); use improved params h=1024/l=2/e=192/d=0.45/lr=2.5e-4/wd=3e-5/epochs=55/es-pat=12/sch-pat=5 for better generalization. Train then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
